footer.tagline: We build SaaS products. Creators distribute them. Everyone wins.

hero.title: We build. They distribute. Everyone wins.
hero.subtitle: Etudia is a studio that builds B2C SaaS products and distributes them through content creators. Zero ads. Pure word-of-mouth.

step1.description: We identify a niche and code the SaaS from A to Z in 30 days.

step2.description: Creators talk to their audience and earn 30-50% commission.

step3.title: Everyone wins
step3.description: Users get a quality product. Creators monetize. We scale.

transparency.title: Building in Public
transparency.description: At Etudia, we believe in transparency. Check our public dashboard to see real-time performance of our SaaS, generated revenues, and the impact of our partners.

hero.title: Got an audience? Turn it into recurring revenue.
hero.subtitle: No coding needed. No investment needed. We provide a ready-to-sell SaaS, you talk to your community, you earn your commission every month.

commission.title: 30-50% commission
commission.description: On every subscription from your link. Recurring revenue as long as the user stays subscribed.

code.title: Zero tech skills needed
code.description: We build, host, and maintain. You just need to talk about it.

assets.title: Marketing assets provided
assets.description: Visuals, video scripts, talking points. Everything's ready for your content.

dashboard.title: Real-time dashboard
dashboard.description: Track your revenue, conversions and performance from your dashboard.

simulator.title: Calculate Your Revenue
simulator.subtitle: Estimate how much you could earn

choose.title: Pick a SaaS from the catalog or propose an idea

assets.title: We give you your unique affiliate link + marketing assets

promote.title: You talk to your audience: videos, posts, stories

earn.title: You earn your commission every month on each subscriber

items.a: It depends on your audience size and conversion rate. Use the simulator above to estimate. A creator with 10,000 subscribers and 2% conversion on a €12.90 SaaS with 40% commission earns about €1,000/month.

items.q: Can I promote multiple SaaS products?
items.a: Yes. You can promote as many SaaS products as you want from the catalog. Each has its own affiliate link.
By bank transfer every month. You receive your commission on all active subscriptions generated through your link.
A simple and transparent partnership agreement. No exclusivity, no time commitment. You can stop whenever you want.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: We're a solo entrepreneur building with AI. We use the latest technologies to build quality products quickly. Our process has been optimized to go from idea to production in just 30 days.

manifesto.title: Our belief
manifesto.content: Paid marketing is an arms race. Acquisition costs are skyrocketing, margins are collapsing, and mediocre products survive on ad budgets. We believe in a different model: build excellent products and distribute them through people who have their audience's trust. No ads. No growth hacks. Just great products carried by the right people.

value1.title: Transparency
value1.description: Public dashboard, open numbers, shared mistakes.

value2.title: Speed
value2.description: 30 days to build a SaaS. Not 6 months.

value4.title: Quality
value4.description: Every SaaS is maintained and improved. No abandoned products.

program.title: 30-Day Program
program.description: Our process has been optimized to build a complete and functional SaaS in just 30 days. From market validation to production launch, with our creator partners.

cta.title: Join the adventure
cta.description: Whether you're a creator or have a SaaS idea, there's a place for you at Etudia.
